meaning: Commonwealth Scientific and Industrial Research Organization(澳大利亚)联邦科学与工业研究组织
examples: Australian science agency CSIRO recently received this adorable letter.
CSIRO cites a worst case of 20% less water in 20 years and 50% in 50 years.
Researchers at Monash University in Melbourne with help from the CSIRO and Deakin University have printed not one, but two metal jet engines.
The CSIRO scientists hope it can be used throughout the developing world, said Manins.
To provide air monitoring capabilities to third world citizens, CSIRO has developed a tool that measures fine particulate levels.
